tasks.subject: Task 0: UploadIntegrityError exception
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Typed exception for upload sha256 mismatch.

**Files:**
- src/kinoforge/core/errors.py
- tests/core/test_errors_upload_integrity.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "tests/core/test_errors_upload_integrity.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_errors_upload_integrity.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UploadIntegrityError subclass of KinoforgeError", "carries local_sha256/server_sha256/bytes_sent", "__str__ includes both hashes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Server PUT /upload route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PUT /upload streams video/mp4, sha256-echoes, returns {path,size,sha256}.

**Files:**
- src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py
- tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upload.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py", "tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upload.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upload.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PUT /upload returns {path,size,sha256}", "file lands under _UPLOAD_DIR", "_UPLOAD_DIR constant exists", "_sanitize_upload_filename strips and falls back"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: /upload rejection paths + /health capability
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 415/413 rejection + atomic publish + /health 'upload' capability tag.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py", "tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upload.py", "tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_health.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upload.py tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_health.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wrong CT \u2192 415", "oversize \u2192 413 + no published file", "mid-abort leaves no published file", "/health includes 'upload'"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SpandrelEngine._upload_source + dispatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Client helper PUT /upload + sha256 verify; upscale() dispatches file:// vs http(s)://.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/upscalers/spandrel/__init__.py", "tests/upscalers/test_spandrel_upload.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/test_spandrel_upload.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_upload_source PUT + sha256 verify + file:// return", "sha256 mismatch raises UploadIntegrityError", "502 retries once", "upscale() dispatches on scheme"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Server-side cleanup in /upscale finally
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _run_upscale_job finally-unlinks source if under _UPLOAD_DIR.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py", "tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upload_cleanup.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upload_cleanup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upload under _UPLOAD_DIR unlinked", "sibling untouched", "cleanup runs on failure"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Regression sweep + pre-commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Targeted + full pytest + pre-commit; fix any regressions.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run pytest -x", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pre-commit clean", "targeted suite green", "no new failures in full suite"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: T15 live smoke (single-shot spandrel upscale)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Goal:** Live smoke against RunPod; output dims = 2x input; ledger empty post-run.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_spandrel_x2_upscale.py", "examples/configs/upscale-spandrel-x2.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_spandrel_x2_upscale.py -v --runlive && pixi run kinoforge list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/health advertises 'upload'", "PUT /upload returns matching sha256", "output dims = 2x input dims", "upload file unlinked under _UPLOAD_DIR", "kinoforge list shows zero pods + empty ledger", "spend <= $0.10", "evidence JSON committed"], "modelTier": "standard", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate", "live-spend"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["upload-PUT", "pre-upscale"], ["upscale-done", "dims-2x"], ["pod-destroyed", "kinoforge-list-empty"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: T16 live smoke (Wan T2V + spandrel multi-stage warm-reuse)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Goal:** Stage-1 Wan + stage-2 spandrel on same warm pod; zero PUT /upload for stage 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_wan_t2v_plus_spandrel_x2.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_wan_t2v_plus_spandrel_x2.py -v --runlive && pixi run kinoforge list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stage-1 Wan output lands outside _UPLOAD_DIR", "stage-2 upscale runs with no PUT /upload (sibling-skip path)", "final dims = 2x stage-1 dims", "kinoforge list shows zero pods + empty ledger", "spend <= $3.50", "evidence JSON committed"], "modelTier": "standard", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate", "live-spend"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["stage-1-generate", "wan-T2V-done"], ["stage-2-upscale", "no-upload-PUT"], ["dims-2x", "warm-reuse-confirmed"], ["pod-destroyed"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: PROGRESS.md close + successful-generations.md entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flip P2 PARTIAL→SHIPPED; log spandrel x2 upscale tuple in successful-generations.md.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md", "/workspace/successful-generations.md", "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-29-upscaler-packaging-pivot.md.tasks.json"], "verifyCommand": "git log --oneline -5 && rg 'spandrel' /workspace/successful-generations.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PROGRESS PARTIAL\u2192SHIPPED", "successful-generations.md new entry", "tasks.json statuses completed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
